sensitivity_note: Post-filter on modern detector output (time_window=2 yr, same algorithm as ETAS validation). All 27 episodes already satisfy tighter thresholds — modest min_events/min_regions tightening does not reduce N_obs.
interpretation: Liberal detection arises from exploratory sliding-window search (142 candidates) and merge, not from small-N episodes. FDR on N=47 does not correct the full search space.
